privileged_info_summary: The task updates a firearm registration in the OpenCAD system. The weapon is a Combat Pistol (a real GTA V weapon) with serial number SM-9981 registered to a synthetic identity named Sarah Mitchell. The task requires changing the weapon color from Black to Pink (both are verified as available colors in GTA V). Login credentials are admin@opencad.local with password Admin123!. All metadata values are correctly specified and match the task setup configuration. The data is entirely synthetic, created specifically for the OpenCAD task system, though it references real GTA V game entities (Combat Pistol weapon model, Pink color tint) and real GTA V locations (Vinewood Boulevard address).
